## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Other:

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why, in 1–3 sentences. -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] One skill or one coherent change per PR.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter has all required fields (for skill changes).
- [ ] Body is ≤ 500 lines; overflow lives in `references/`.
- [ ] Skill directory name matches `name` in frontmatter.
- [ ] `README.md` present and current (for new skills).
- [ ] No secrets, absolute local paths, or personal data.
- [ ] I did NOT manually bump the `version` field.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Optional — anything you'd like the reviewer to focus on or be aware of. -->
